xbrli:xbrl.in-bse-shp:DisclosureOfNotesOnShareholdi: 1.The shares issued in Follow-on public issue of 2007 on which calls were in arrears were forfeited on January 28, 2014 under the authority granted by the Board except for 48 shares of face value of Rs. 10 each where the matter related to litigations, this would be decided based on the status/outcome of the litigations/payment of call money by the shareholders. The said shares form part of the fully paid shares. 2. Deutsche Bank Trust Company Americas holds 1,335,291,133 equity shares of the Bank constituting 18.67% of the equity share capital of the Bank at December 31, 2025 as depositary for ADS holders. 3. Effective January 2, 2026, the Deposit Agreement has been amended to provide voting rights to the ADR holders subject to them demonstrating compliance with Section 12B of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 4. Pursuant to SEBI circular dated December 19, 2017, folios have been consolidated based on PAN irrespective of the schemes/sub-accounts. Total number of folios as on December 31, 2025 is 2,241,080 after consolidating folios on the basis of PAN the number is 2,139,595. 5. Government of India, Ministry of Finance, Department of Economic Affairs, FIPB Unit vide their letter dated February 22, 2005 had given their approval to ICICI Bank to ensure that the total foreign shareholding do not exceed 74% of the share capital. 6. Voting rights on equity shares transferred to the Investor Education and Protection Fund, Unclaimed Shares Suspense Account and Suspense Escrow Demat Account (Pursuant to Scheme of arrangement for delisting of ICICI Securities Limited) are frozen. Voting rights on 36,425 equity shares lying in the Suspense Escrow Demat Account are not frozen as per SEBI Circular dated December 18, 2023.
xbrli:xbrl.in-bse-shp:NameOfTheShareholder: ADITYA BIRLA SUN LIFE MUTUAL FUND
VANGUARD TOTAL INTERNATIONAL STOCK INDEX FUND
Suspense Escrow Account (Pursuant to Scheme of arrangement for delisting of ICICI Securites Limited)
xbrli:xbrl.in-bse-shp:DisclosureOfNotesOnSharesWhic: Pursuant to Scheme of arrangement for delisting of ICICI Securities Limited
